title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Colgate-Palmolive India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Colgate-Palmolive India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Colgate-Palmolive India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Colgate-Palmolive India:
Colgate-Palmolive India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colgate-Palmolive India!
